options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal_condition
options.description:
Your Goal Condition for your game

ender_dragon - Goal when the Ender Dragon is defeated
wither - Goal when the Wither is defeated
both_bosses - Goal when the Ender Dragon and Wither is defeated
advancements_only - Goal when you collect a certain amount of Advancements and/or Items
ruby_hunt - Goal when a certain amount of rubies are collected (McGuffin hunt)

options.name: advancements_required_for_goal
options.description:
Determines the number of advancements needed in order to beat the game! These Advancements are required for goaling
in addition to your regular goal. If this is set to zero, no advancements will be required to goal.

If fewer available advancements exist than this number, the number of available advancements will be used instead.

options.name: excluded_locations
options.description:
Determines Blacklisted Locations in the Randomizer
If a Location Category is given here, Checks won't appear in locations categorized under it

This Wiki Page details all locations that're blacklisted via these settings:
https://modded.wiki/w/Fabric_Archipelago_Mod:Optional_Locations

Options:
    "Hard" - Disables Locations that're Hard
    "Exploration" - Disables Locations that might require Exploration
    "Unreasonable" - Disables Location's that're EXTREMELY Hard

options.name: percentage_of_rubies_needed
options.description:
The Percentage of Rubies that need to be collected to Goal for Ruby Hunt.
(Only Takes Effect when going for the Ruby Hunt Goal)

options.name: total_rubies
options.description:
Maximum possible number of Rubies that will be in the item pool

If fewer available locations exist in the pool than this number, the number of available locations will be used instead.

Required Percentage of Rubies will be calculated based off of that number.

(Only Takes Effect when going for the Ruby Hunt Goal)

options.name: itemsanity
options.description: Enables "Itemsanity" which causes items obtainable in Survival to be checks

options.name: items_required_for_goal
options.description:
Determines the number of Items needed in order to beat the game! You will need to gather this many unique items in
addition to your regular goal. If this is set to zero, no items will be required to goal.

If fewer available items exist than this number, the number of available items will be used instead.

This Option only takes effect if Itemsanity is enabled, it is highly recommended to set this number high (~200) in
order to prevent fast goals

options.name: itemsanity_local_fill
options.description:
The Percentage of Itemsanity Checks that should only contain items from your world
(Highly recommend setting this to a high value to prevent everyone's items from being in your game)

options.name: excluded_from_itemsanity
options.description:
Determines certain Items that shouldn't appear in Itemsanity
Useful for blacklisting tedious items, or cutting down the amount of Itemsanity checks in a game

Options:
    Discs - Music Discs
    Dyed Items - Items that are Dyed (Concretes, Wools, Terracottas, etc.)
    Flowers - Flowers (all flowers except Wither Rose)
    Rare Ores - Ores that are extremely rare (such as Deepslate Emerald)
    Mob Heads - Mob Heads that're only dropped from Charged Creeper Explosions
    Netherite Gear - Netherite Tools, Armor, and Netherite Smithing Template
    Trims - Smithing Templates that're used for Trims (Doesn't include Upgrade Templates)
    Sherds - Pottery Sherds
    Slabs - Slabs (such as Oak Slabs, Stone Slabs, etc.)
    Stairs - Stairs (such as Oak Stairs, Stone Stairs, etc.)
    Walls - Walls, Fences, and Fence Gates (Oak Fence, Stone Wall, etc.)

options.name: empty_fill_percentage
options.description:
Replaces a certain amount of Non-Trap Junk Items with Items that do nothing.
This option is primarily for preventing massive amounts of inventory clutter when Itemsanity is Enabled

options.name: required_before_nether
options.description:
Makes it so certain Items are required in Logic before Nether Access

Used to help make the Randomizer Easier or Harder

Available Items
    "Iron Weapons"
    "Iron Armor"
    "Bow"
    "Jump"
    "Sprint"
    "Beds"

options.name: required_before_bosses
options.description:
Makes it so certain Items are required in Logic before you need
to fight the Ender Dragon or Wither

Used to help make the Randomizer Easier or Harder

Available Items
    "Iron Weapons"
    "Iron Armor"
    "Bow"
    "Jump"
    "Sprint"
    "Beds"

options.name: required_before_raids
options.description:
Makes it so certain Items are required in Logic before you need
to fight a Raid

Used to help make the Randomizer Easier or Harder

Available Items
    "Iron Weapons"
    "Iron Armor"
    "Bow"
    "Jump"
    "Sprint"
    "Beds"

options.name: keep_inventory
options.description: Prevents you from dropping your items when you die!

options.name: randomized_abilities
options.description:
Determines which abilities and items will be added as items in the item pool
If an ability is not present in the list they will be treated as unlocked from the start

Some abilities (such as Jump) don't gate any content, and are meant mainly for the challenge

Lockable Abilities:
    "Chests" - Removes the ability to craft and use chests (and similar storage containers), and adds Chests to the Item pool.
    "Jump" - Removes the ability to jump, and adds Jumping to the Item pool.
    "Sprint" - Removes the ability to run, and adds Sprint to the Item pool.
    "Swim" - Removes the ability to enter water, and adds Swim to the Item pool.

options.name: time_saving_options
options.description:
Decrease Wait times or Increase likelihood for various events that can occur in the game

Options:
    "Wither Skulls" - Increases the 2.5% Chance for Wither Skulls to drop to 25%
    "Rabbits Foot" - Increases the 10% Chance for Rabbit's Foot to drop to 50%
    "Drowned Items" - Increases the Chance for a Drowned to drop the items they're holding to 100%
    "Copper Oxidation" - Increases the Chance for Copper Blocks to attempt to Oxidize from 5% to 55%

options.name: trap_fill_percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of junk items in the item pool with random traps

options.name: reverse_controls_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes WASD, Shift, Jump, Break, and Place to Swap for a short duration

options.name: inverted_mouse_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the Mouse to Invert for a short duration

options.name: ice_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes all blocks to become slippery for a short duration

options.name: random_effect_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which applies a random Negative Status Effect

options.name: stun_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap that temporarily stops movement of the player

options.name: tnt_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap that spawns a block of lit TNT on the player's position

options.name: teleport_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap that Teleports the player similar to Chorus Fruit

options.name: bee_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap that Spawns 6 angry bees near the player

options.name: literature_trap_weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap that Opens Literature Pop-Ups

options.name: deathlink_enabled
options.description: Enable DeathLink

options.name: traplink_enabled
options.description: Enable TrapLink

options.name: enabled_mods
options.description:
WARNING: Fabric Archipelago's Mod support is still in a very early stage, so do keep in mind that playing with mods can lead to unbeatable games!

This option allows other mods to be integrated into the randomizer if they are supported.
You can add a mod by putting its Mod ID here.

For a list of supported Mods, refer to here: https://modded.wiki/w/Fabric_Archipelago_Mod:Mod_Support

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.
